title: ggpaintr Workflow
text: ggpaintr now focuses ggpaintr workflow. plot described one ggplot-like formula string. Placeholder tokens inside string converted Shiny controls, completed current inputs, evaluated plot, rendered generated code readable runtime feedback. Supported placeholders : var text num expr upload upload currently supports .csv .rds.

title: ggpaintr Workflow
code: library(ggpaintr) library(ggplot2)  obj <- paintr_formula(   "ggplot(data = iris, aes(x = var, y = var)) +     geom_point(aes(color = var), size = num) +     labs(title = text) +     facet_wrap(expr)" )  names(obj$expr_list) #> [1] "ggplot"     "geom_point" "labs"       "facet_wrap" names(obj$keywords_list$ggplot) #> [1] "ggplot+2"   "ggplot+3+2" "ggplot+3+3"

title: ggpaintr Workflow
code:
runtime <- paintr_build_runtime(   obj,   list(     "ggplot+3+2" = "Sepal.Length",     "ggplot+3+3" = "Sepal.Width",     "ggplot+3+4" = "Species",     "geom_point+2" = 2.5,     "labs+2" = "Iris scatter",     "facet_wrap+2" = "~ Species",     "geom_point+checkbox" = TRUE,     "labs+checkbox" = TRUE,     "facet_wrap+checkbox" = TRUE   ) )  runtime$code_text #> [1] "ggplot(data = iris, aes(x = Sepal.Length, y = Sepal.Width)) +
  geom_point(aes()) +
  labs(title = "Iris scatter") +
  facet_wrap(~Species)" inherits(runtime$plot, "ggplot") #> [1] TRUE

title: ggpaintr Workflow
text: generated app: renders one control tab per layer delays var selectors upload-backed data available clears plot failure shows Input error: Plot error: messages inline preserves generated code completion succeeds plotting fails
code: ggpaintr_app(" ggplot(data = iris, aes(x = var, y = var)) +   geom_point(aes(color = var), size = num) +   labs(title = text) +   facet_wrap(expr) ")

title: ggpaintr Workflow
code: out_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".R") generate_shiny(obj, list(), out_file, style = FALSE) file.exists(out_file) #> [1] TRUE

title: ggpaintr Workflow
text: Structural parse failures still stop app launch. var placeholders still require data source UI preparation. Missing local data objects unknown_object deferred draw time. Render-time ggplot failures missing faceting variables surfaced runtime error path plot failures.

code: @Manual{,   title = {ggpaintr: Build Formula-Driven Shiny Apps for 'ggplot2'},   author = {Wangqian Ju and Jinji Pang and Zhili Qiao},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://willju-wangqian.github.io/ggpaintr/}, }

title: ggpaintr
text: ggpaintr R package maintained ggpaintr workflow. turns single ggplot-like formula string small Shiny app generated controls, rendered plots, generated code, upload support, inline runtime feedback.

title: ggpaintr
ggpaintr
text: Supported placeholders inside formula string : var text num expr upload upload currently supports .csv .rds.

title: ggpaintr
code: library(ggpaintr) library(ggplot2)  obj <- paintr_formula(   "ggplot(data = mtcars, aes(x = var, y = var)) +     geom_point(size = num) +     labs(title = text)" )  runtime <- paintr_build_runtime(   obj,   list(     "ggplot+3+2" = "mpg",     "ggplot+3+3" = "disp",     "geom_point+2" = 2,     "labs+2" = "Mtcars scatter",     "geom_point+checkbox" = TRUE,     "labs+checkbox" = TRUE   ) )  runtime$code_text #> [1] "ggplot(data = mtcars, aes(x = mpg, y = disp)) +\n  geom_point(size = 2) +\n  labs(title = \"Mtcars scatter\")" inherits(runtime$plot, "ggplot") #> [1] TRUE

title: ggpaintr
code: library(ggpaintr)  ggpaintr_app(" ggplot(data = iris, aes(x = var, y = var)) +   geom_point(aes(color = var), size = num) +   labs(title = text) +   facet_wrap(expr) ")

title: ggpaintr
code: obj <- paintr_formula(   "ggplot(data = upload, aes(x = var, y = var)) + geom_point()" )  generate_shiny(obj, list(), tempfile(fileext = ".R"))

title: ggpaintr
text: Structural formula errors fail parse time. var data source fails preparing UI. Missing local data objects deferred draw-time plot errors. Render-time ggplot failures shown inline error channel. See vignette("ggpaintr-workflow") fuller walkthrough.

code: library(ggplot2)  obj <- paintr_formula(   "ggplot(data = iris, aes(x = var, y = var)) + geom_point()" ) runtime <- paintr_build_runtime(   obj,   list("ggplot+3+2" = "Sepal.Length", "ggplot+3+3" = "Sepal.Width", "geom_point+checkbox" = TRUE) ) #> Don't know how to handle keyword: iris. Let it pass. isTRUE(runtime$ok) #> [1] TRUE

code: library(ggplot2)  obj <- paintr_formula(   "ggplot(data = iris, aes(x = Sepal.Length, y = Sepal.Width)) + geom_point()" ) runtime <- paintr_build_runtime(obj, list("geom_point+checkbox" = TRUE)) #> Don't know how to handle keyword: iris. Let it pass. plot_obj <- paintr_get_plot(runtime$complete_expr_list, runtime$eval_env) inherits(plot_obj, "ggplot") #> [1] TRUE

title: ggpaintr 0.1.0
text: repositioned package around maintained ggpaintr workflow archived legacy package implementation archive/legacy-package/ introduced focused public API: ggpaintr_app(), paintr_formula(), paintr_build_runtime(), paintr_get_plot(), generate_shiny() replaced legacy package docs, vignette, pkgdown content ggpaintr-first documentation added roxygen2-based package documentation active implementation prepared package structure R CMD check CRAN-oriented cleanup
